name: Bromothymol Blue
plain_summary: Common pH indicator (yellow↔blue); teaching tool for acid–base colour and λ_max shift.

abs.plain_caption: Visible band near ~430 nm near neutral pH (shifts with acid/base form).
abs.lit: Teaching envelope for bromothymol blue near-neutral aqueous form (~430 nm region). Acid/base forms differ.
abs.quality_note: Tier A teaching spectrum — indicator demo
